title: WTI crude oil futures go negative — historic oil price crash
description: WTI crude oil futures for May delivery crash to -$37.63 per barrel on April 20, 2020 — the first negative oil price in history — as COVID-19 destroys demand while the OPEC+ price war floods supply. Brent crude falls to $16/barrel. US shale producers face bankruptcy. Major integrated oil companies slash capex and suspend buybacks. The broader collapse begins March 9 when Saudi Arabia and Russia fail to agree on OPEC+ cuts.
